Wu's Quivering Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 28
DMG: 23 Dmg Bonus: 115
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 9.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Wu's Quivering Staff

# Sep 09 2017 at 6:33 AM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
I picked one of these up pretty cheap (especially compared to Tranquil Staff and such) on Agnarr in Kunark era. I wanted a better trainer than the abandoned orc shovel. This is pretty heavy (as the much older posts complain about) but so are most 2hb in this era of the game.

QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2004 at 12:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784541718
View User Forum
57 posts
ouch this thing sells for 25pp on Lanys. the 9 stones (i thought it was ten when i used it) just plain bites. the dmg/dly is awesome for a 20 monk in pc but it just kills your looting ability. i just bought a battleworn ch'ror you should check that out. it's got a recc'd level though. at 30 it's 21/34 but it's +sta and +hps and 4 stones. i also have a patchwork jetsam 30/35 (recd lvl of 27) but i hate swinging a rusty board at mobs. i love looks. if i didn't huchee would be a male ikky /smile. anyhow the cracked staff look just sucked and so did the 9 stones, but this will let you mow mobs down from 20-27, then i would upgrade.

# Jun 30 2003 at 8:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759260560
32 posts
Caps lock broken?
▲ Page top
Drops and Weight
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2002 at 12:05 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591746809549
Scholar
20 posts
Yes, this is a drop off common yard trash. I got one to drop off a vapor golem. Also got a Trance Stick to drop off a shadow near the entrance. Of course, on Fennin Ro, prices suck, so you can usually pick up one of these for about 2kpp....Trance sticks sell for 750pp.

And about the weight issues, you have to keep in mind the lvl that the mobs are here. at about lvl 45, typical hunting lvl for this zone, the weight limit for monks is 17 stones; so a 9 pound staff really isn't that much when ya take into consideration that by that point in lvl'ing, you prolly have decent lightweight gear anyway. I myself swing a Peacebringer, which is 10 stones weight, but am only over my weight limit by 1 stone (weigh 19 when I have PB equipped). Swinging the goranga club I use for 1hb, along with my fists, my weight is 11 stones. Weight reduction packs, like the Rallic Pack or Evil Eye bag are a lifesaver. Just my 2cp worth as well...

Asturias Aurora - 53 Disciple of Quellious - Fennin Ro

Ventagge Wyldfyre - 49 Ranger of Tunare - Fennin Ro

Coins Malone - 22 Rogue - Fennin Ro
▲ Page top

__DEL__1591775625643
2 posts
Well i was camping in CoM with a group and this thing dropped we had no monk in group but someone said they had one so we let them have it. Me not knowing Value said sure was only there for 2hours and this thing dropped off of a Fog Golem at temple. Just my 2cp

Prexus Server

▲ Page top
Dropped for us in CoM
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2002 at 12:38 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249913841
4 posts
Hello all...and well met.

Curently working on my lil 51 cleric on Tholuxe server. We have a regular group that camps on the right alley to the bridge each nite. We clear the bridge and then pull from the huts there near till the bridge pops again. We have killed there on and off for about 5 levels. In that time we have had three drops. First was a springwood club. Last nite, the Wu's quivering dropped off of...yard trash, Fog Golem, dark blue to a level 50, lite blue to a level 51. We kept it for our regular 54 monk who was not there last nite and was thrilled when I gave him his present today! The wt. is now 9 stones on this item, btw. Two pulls later, the bard only piercer dropped, 6/19 10ac 3int wt 1.4. Our Bard was there so she was thrilled too.

So...for once when it says "multiple creatures" can drop items, I suppose they are right. The bard dagger dropped off a Fog Golem as well, but we could see him wielding it. Could not see the golem wielding the WQS tho, which I thought to be odd. The springwood club dropped off a goo. All these mobs were "yard trash" run of the mill blues.

Good luck to all camping this item. CoM on our server is always packed with monks camping this thing. We were most thrilled to get it for our lead monk. So what if I have to hold all his loot and throw him a zing now and then...the staff flat out rocks!

Good luck to all
Taboux Healzjoo 51 Drow Cleric
Shug Ah 56 Hummie Druid of Tunare
▲ Page top
BOTH drop in CoM
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2002 at 3:33 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771914603
14 posts
Wu's Trance and Wu's Quivering have both dropped for me in CoM. Both from yard trash, in fact, I have seen the Trance Stick drop twice. I was there for exp and not for the weapons, maybe thats why it didnt seem like a long time between drops. But I would say I have put in 20 hours in CoM in about 3 levels. Anyway, skeleton dropped the Trance Stick and a Golem dropped the Quivering, sorry cant remember exact names. Both in CoM. Happy Hunting!

~Faeline Greyskies
~Twilight's Circle
~Seventh Hammer Server =Þ

It is possible that this drops in the CoM, but to my knowledge you are thinking of a Master WU's Trance Stick(of which I received in CoM and use). Stats are WT 1, 7 18 procs smite 2-83dd. It dropped off of an apparition after camping CoM for 4 days. Good luck, and good journey,


40lvl Ashen Monk

This drops in City of Mist. One of the best (aquireable) staves in the game for monks. Also note that the weight was reduced on this staff as well as others to make it more monk friendly.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 21 2001 at 3:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Weight reduced to 9lbs....crazy crazy dmg until you can get an IFS, RFS or Tranq Staff. Well worth the 25k it sells for on Mith Marr
